# facebox

> facebox is the all-in-one AI girl studio — create stunning, consistent AI girls with multiple angles and bodies in seconds at facebox.dev.

## Pages

- [Home](/): the all-in-one AI girl studio start screen.
- [Log in](/auth): log in to your facebox account.
- [Generate face](/generate-face): generate a brand new AI face for a character.
- [Choose face](/choose-face): pick a face for your character.
- [Create photo](/create): create a new AI photo of an existing character.
- [My characters](/characters): browse and manage your AI characters.
- [Storage](/storage): all your generated photos in one place.
- [Video](/video): AI video face-swap (coming soon).
- [Gems](/top-ups): top up your gems for more generations.
- [My account](/account): manage your account and subscription.

## Optional

- [Help](/help): support and FAQs.
- [Info](/info): terms and privacy.
